# Saree Pro Development Guidelines

## Project Overview
Saree Pro is a premium food delivery platform with multi-role support (customers, drivers, merchants, admins), AI integration, smart logistics, and compliance features.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 15 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Supabase for backend
- Google Gemini AI

## Development Rules
- Use TypeScript for all new code
- Follow Next.js best practices
- Implement responsive design with mobile-first approach
- Use Supabase for data operations
- Maintain security and compliance standards

## Code Structure
- `app/` - Pages and API routes
- `components/` - Reusable UI components
- `lib/` - Utilities and configurations
- `types/` - TypeScript definitions

## Environment Setup
Ensure `.env.local` contains required Supabase credentials before development.
